message:
test(pt-core): expand no-mock coverage for goal_optimizer, validation, myopic_policy, rollback

112 new tests across 4 modules:
- goal_optimizer (37): serde roundtrips, PreferenceModel, DP/ILP/greedy
  fallbacks, reoptimize_on_change, Pareto dominance, log events
- validation (29): GroundTruth serde/abandoned/resolved, map_outcome_hint,
  map_exit_event, extract_comm, record_outcome_with_source, engine accessors
- myopic_policy (32): error display, get_action_cost mappings (Freeze→Pause,
  Quarantine→Throttle), constrained decisions, rationale branches, serialization
- rollback (14): RollbackResult/UpdateResult constructors, manager accessors,
  backup_current errors, recovery instructions structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
